promoted_facts.fact: Franchisee sets room rates subject to System Standards compliance and best rate guarantee; may not charge guest more than rate specified at booking time
System Standards comprise 3,609 pages as of issuance date
Core Management must devote all working time to Hotel; may not concurrently maintain position at another lodging facility
Revenue manager certification required within 90 days; may serve up to 20 Brand Hotels
Hotel opening timeline: new development 20-36 months after application fee; conversion 9-12 months
For DRA, application fee per hotel is $50,000 + $500/room over 125 with NO initial franchise fee; royalty 5%; capex reserve 4%; initial term 20 years
Existing operating Brand Hotels may receive NO Area of Protection at all upon signing FA
Hyatt Group's franchise and other fee revenues grew from $297M (2022) to $364M (2023) to $458M (2024) — 54% growth over 2 years across all Hyatt franchise brands
